gt_provenance.details: VMA graded vs stored secret permutation tau (aloepri.py:134-137); vma.py:63 inverse_perm. Real cached weights, obfuscated synthetically (model_id aloepri-synthetic). Not attack-derived.

score_normalization.details: No self-max normalization. VMA = direct fraction-correct. alpha_e=0 -> 1.0 legitimate (zero noise + column-perm-invariant signature). Bits raw; keymat CLUB -2.4 not clipped.

result_existence.details: All cited numbers exist+match: uplift +0.434@a0.2, +0.600@a0.35; Spearman CLUB +0.976 retr-PVI +1.00; rs_vs_club_all 1.0 fe 0.991; keymat VMA 0.0 CLUB -2.3937; cover_break p95 0.917@L0.

dead_code.details: cover_break fastica_anchor branch raises NotImplementedError (cover_break.py:81); ridge variant executed; disclosed as deferred in writeup.

scope.details: Single cached embedding table; R1 3-seed N=1000, R2 1-seed N=1200 (disclosed). R3=fullcheck-L0-10.json is Qwen3-4B ACTIVATIONS, a different surface, not a matched cover-break.

probe_independence.club_on_phi: INDEPENDENT — no Hungarian/NN matching; uses tau only to form positive pairs; variational CLUB MI estimator (measures.py:45, club.py:101). The clean probe.
probe_independence.retrieval_pvi: DEPENDENT — 'VMA-in-bits': inverter + cosine-softmax retrieval ranks the true candidate (measures.py:61, vinfo.py:165, _retrieval.py:44); spike aloepri_vma_sweep.py:12 labels it dependent. Its rho=1.0 with VMA is PARTIALLY CIRCULAR; must not be cited as independent confirmation.

claims.impact: needs_qualifier — rests on CLUB-on-phi ONLY (independent); retrieval-PVI is attack-in-bits; soften bidirectional language

action_items: Demote retrieval-PVI from 'independent probe' to 'dependent reference (VMA-in-bits)' in RESULTS_STANDARDIZED.md and the claim.
Thesis-confirmation rests on CLUB-on-phi (rho +0.976 sweep; +1.00/+0.99 recorrelation) only.
Clarify R3 cover_break is Qwen3-4B activations, a separate surface (plaintext baseline + deferred matched variant).
